title: Haribo Tangfastics 140g (Pack of 12)
features: Tangy Mix: Enjoy a perfect tangy taste sensation with HARIBO Tangfastics, featuring a mix of fizzy cola bottles, sour cherries, dummies, and crocodiles shaped gums.
Loved by All Ages: Perfect for both kids and grown-ups, making it an ideal treat for sharing or enjoying on-the-go.
Trusted Brand: HARIBO, America’s #1 gummi brand, is known for its high-quality and beloved confectionery products.
Fun and Tangy: Experience a fun tangy taste sensation with a perfect hit of sweet and sour flavors in every bite.
Bulk Buying Convenience: Purchase a pack of 12, each containing 140g of HARIBO Tangfastics, perfect for stocking up at home, sharing with friends, or enjoying on-the-go.
description: Product Description HARIBO Tangfastics Gummy Sweets 140g (Pack of 12) Product Description: Experience the ultimate tangy sensation with HARIBO Tangfastics! This iconic mix delivers a perfect balance of sweet and sour flavors, providing a delightful taste sensation that's loved by all ages. Each pack is filled with a variety of beloved shapes including fizzy cola bottles, sour cherries, dummies, and crocodiles, ensuring a fun and flavorful snacking experience. Key Features: Tangy Mix Variety of Shapes Fizzy Cola Flavour Sweet Foam Gums Bulk Buy - Pack of 12 As America’s #1 gummi brand, HARIBO is celebrated for its quality and innovation. With a Guinness World Records achievement and a 98% brand awareness in the UK, it's no wonder that kids and grown-ups alike love the tangy world of HARIBO Tangfastics! Ingredients Glucose syrup; sugar; gelatine, dextrose, acids: citric acid, malic acid; acidity regulators: calcium citrates, sodium hydrogen malate; caramelised sugar syrup; fruit and plant concentrates: apple aronia, blackcurrant, carrot, elderberry, grape, hibiscus, kiwi, lemon mango, orange, passion fruit, safflower, spirulina; flavouring, elderberry extract; glazing agent: carnauba wax. Manufacturer Contact Information DUNHILLS (PONTEFRACT) PLC, PO BOX 1, PONTEFRACT, WF8 1WX, ENGLAND See more
